Test Name: Create PM and Schedule Based on Asset Class
Prerequisites: Configured asset classes, PM templates defined
Steps: 1. Create asset with given class; 2. Create PM for that class with WORKTYPE=INSP; 3. Run PMWOGEN cron or manual generation
Expected Result: PM is created and linked to asset; inspection WO is generated when due; WORKTYPE=INSP

Prerequisites: Active PM with due date today, cron configured
Steps: 1. Set PM status=ACTIVE and due today; 2. Run PMWOGEN; 3. Open Work Order Tracking and search by PMNUM
Expected Result: Inspection WO generated with correct WORKTYPE, asset/location, dates, and owner group

Prerequisites: Maximo Mobile configured; user has assigned inspection WO; inspection form linked
Steps: 1. Login to Maximo Mobile as inspector; 2. Sync; 3. Open assigned inspection WO; 4. Complete all inspection questions; 5. Save/Complete
Expected Result: Inspection form renders; responses captured; WO status updated on server after sync

Steps: 1. Create new inspection WO without ASSETNUM; 2. Save
Expected Result: Script raises error or logs missing ASSETNUM according to design; save fails or warning logged

Prerequisites: Automation script deployed to default PRIORITY; inspection WO is new
Steps: 1. Create new inspection WO with empty PRIORITY; 2. Save
Expected Result: PRIORITY automatically set to configured default (e.g., MEDIUM); log entry created

Test Name: Follow-up WO Generation from Failed Inspection
Prerequisites: Inspection form with pass/fail and threshold questions; follow-up logic defined
Steps: 1. Execute inspection WO; 2. Enter failing results (out-of-range or Fail); 3. Complete inspection
Expected Result: Corrective follow-up WO is auto-created with reference to original inspection WO; WORKTYPE=CORR; appropriate priority set

Prerequisites: Status domain configured; workflow or automation active
Steps: 1. Approve inspection WO; 2. Start work; 3. Complete inspection; 4. Attempt invalid transitions (e.g., COMP to INPRG)
Expected Result: Valid transitions allowed (e.g., WAPPR→APPR→INPRG→COMP); invalid transitions rejected per rules

Prerequisites: Reporting dataset configured; sample data with overdue WOs
Steps: 1. Run Overdue Inspections report; 2. Filter by site and asset; 3. Export to PDF/Excel
Expected Result: Report lists all overdue inspection WOs with site, asset, days overdue; filters and exports work correctly

Prerequisites: Security group INSPECTOR defined with restricted access
Steps: 1. Login as inspector; 2. Attempt to modify PM configuration; 3. Execute assigned inspection WO; 4. View reports
Expected Result: Inspector can execute and update assigned WOs; cannot modify PMs or admin configurations; only allowed reports visible

Steps: 1. Trigger export job; 2. Verify data in data lake or staging area; 3. Validate sample inspection results vs Maximo
Expected Result: Inspection WOs, PMs, assets, and inspection results are exported successfully and match source data
